details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia article and retrieved complete, accurate data. It correctly identified all co-laureates for the 3 most recent years (2025, 2024, 2023), including all laureates per year. The 2024 and 2023 results match the known facts exactly. The agent also found 2025 data (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis) which was listed on the page as the most recent year.
